title: kuki's Exploration Lite wool [by Andrzej Chomiak]

body:
# **kuki's Exploration Lite wool [by Andrzej Chomiak]**

Extracted wool textures from the game [**Exploration Lite**](https://archive.org/details/exploration-full-lite/screenshot-1.png) (minecraft clone) by Andrzej Chomiak
